distinctive_elements: Opening theme with Japanese melody adapted for English release
Extensive localization audio work including character voice acting for diary entries

notes.localization_audio: Working Designs spent several months on audio and dubbing for North American release. Three versions of opening song 'Daring Dreams' (vocals: Jennifer Stigile) were recorded with Japanese melody but English lyrics, replacing original 'Yuzurenai Negai' by Naomi Tamura due to rights issues.
notes.voice_acting_changes: Japanese version had town NPC dialogue; English version removed this and added voice acting to player character diary entries instead
notes.data_tier: T3 - qualitative only; no specific tempo, key, or chord progression data available in source material
